overview: A colorful and interactive kids learning game for ages 3-8. Features alphabet, numbers, animals, quiz, and a coloring page — all with bright cartoon visuals and sound effects.
features: Home screen with 6 large colorful activity buttons
Alphabet learning A-Z with cartoon images and sound
Numbers 1-10 with visual counters and voice
Animal section with sounds when tapped
Multiple choice quiz game with score tracking
Sound effects and Good Job / Try Again feedback
Offline-capable — all content bundled in the app
